risk_description: Credit pre-screening may produce disparate outcomes across protected or proxy demographic groups.
existing_controls: Initial bias review, feature review, adverse impact testing

risk_description: Applicants and reviewers may not receive clear reasons for model-influenced routing decisions.
existing_controls: Model documentation and reason code design

risk_description: Fraud false positives may block legitimate transactions and create customer disruption.
existing_controls: Human review queue and customer dispute process

risk_description: Fraud patterns may shift, reducing detection accuracy or increasing false positives.
Chatbot may generate inaccurate banking information or unsupported product guidance.
existing_controls: Retrieval grounding and restricted response policy

risk_description: User input may manipulate the model into bypassing instructions or exposing restricted content.
Call summaries may retain personal information not required for the business purpose.
Generated summaries may omit key facts or introduce inaccurate records.
Personalization may use customer data without clear consent or purpose alignment.
Campaign targeting may exclude or over-target customer segments unfairly.
Collections prioritization may intensify collections contact for customers in hardship.
Collections prioritization may create unequal treatment or hardship for vulnerable customers.
existing_controls: Manual review and vulnerable customer policy

risk_description: Resume screening may disadvantage candidates based on proxies for protected characteristics.
Vendor model details and training data may not be sufficiently transparent.
Generated code may introduce insecure patterns or dependency vulnerabilities.
existing_controls: Secure coding review and SAST scanning

risk_description: Developers may paste confidential code, credentials, or customer data into the tool.
Agent may trigger workflow actions without sufficient authorization or human approval.
External complaint text may manipulate the agent into unsafe workflow behavior.
Complaint decisions may be finalized without appropriate escalation.
Vendor extraction model may not meet internal AI governance and audit expectations.
existing_controls: Vendor AI review and contract clauses

risk_description: Incorrect extraction may create processing errors or downstream reporting issues.
